Game.ini.content:
; Path of Titans - Game.ini default for a GameServerApp blueprint
; Path in GSA config template, Windows:
; \serverfiles\PathOfTitans\Saved\Config\WindowsServer\Game.ini
;
; GSA variables used:
; {gameserver.list_name}        - server browser name
; {gameserver.slot_limit}       - max player slots
; {gameserver.query_port}       - Source Query port
; {gameserver.rcon_port}        - Source/Valve RCON port
; {gameserver.rcon_password}    - GSA admin password / RCON password
; {config_parameter id="map"}   - Path of Titans internal map name: Panjura, Island for Gondwa, Riparia, or an exact modded map name
;
; Notes:
; - Stop the server before editing.
; - Each option must be on its own line.
; - Lines starting with ; are examples/optional values.
; - GSA registers \serverfiles\PathOfTitans\Saved\Logs as a separate Logs directory for native Path of Titans log files.

[/Script/PathOfTitans.IGameSession]
ServerName={gameserver.list_name}
ServerMap={config_parameter id="map"}
MaxPlayers={gameserver.slot_limit}
ServerPassword={config_parameter id="server_password"}
ReservedSlots={config_parameter id="reserved_slots"}
bServerPaidUsersOnly=false
bServerAllowChat=true
bServerGlobalChat=true
bServerNameTags=false
bServerFish=true
bServerWaterQualitySystem=true
bOverrideWaterRegeneration=false
bEnableWaterRegeneration=true
WaterRegenerationRateMultiplierUpdate=180
WaterRegenerationRate=60
WaterRegenerationValue=10
WaterRainRegenerationIncrement=20.0
bServerWaystoneCooldownRemoval=true
OverrideWaystoneCooldown=-1
bOverrideMaxCompleteQuestsInLocation=false
MaxCompleteQuestsInLocation=3
WeatherLengthVariation=(X=10,Y=20)
WeatherBlendVariation=(X=1,Y=2)
bServerFallDamage=true
bPermaDeath=false
bDeathInfo=false
ServerDiscord={config_parameter id="server_discord_invite_code"}
bServerAutoRestart={config_parameter id="server_auto_restart"}
; Routine restarts should be scheduled in GSA, not in Path of Titans Game.ini.
ServerDeadBodyTime=0
ServerRespawnTime=45
ServerFootprintLifetime=60
bServerAllowMap=true
bServerAllowMinimap=true
bServerAllow3DMapMarkers=true
;AllowedCharacters={config_parameter id="allowed_character_a"}
;DisallowedCharacters={config_parameter id="disallowed_character_a"}
bServerHomeCaves=true
bServerWellRestedBuff=true
bServerEditAbilitiesInHomeCaves=true
bServerEditAbilitiesWhileSleeping=false
bServerHatchlingCaves=true
bServerHungerThirstInCaves=false
bServerGrowth=true
MinGrowthAfterDeath=0.5
GlobalPassiveGrowthPerMinute=0
ChangeSubspeciesGrowthPenaltyPercent=25
bServerAllowChangeSubspecies=true
bServerCombatTimerAppliesToGroup=true
QuestGrowthMultiplier=1
QuestMarksMultiplier=1.0
bOverrideLocalQuestCooldown=false
LocalQuestCooldown=3600
bOverrideLocationQuestCooldown=false
LocationQuestCooldown=3600
bPOIDiscoveryRewards=true
bEnableExploreQuests=true
bLoseGrowthPastGrowthStages=true
CombatDeathMarksPenaltyPercent=25
CombatDeathGrowthPenaltyPercent=10
FallDeathMarksPenaltyPercent=5
FallDeathGrowthPenaltyPercent=2
SurvivalDeathMarksPenaltyPercent=10
SurvivalDeathGrowthPenaltyPercent=5
AFKDisconnectTime=600
MaxClientPingMs=0
MaxClientPingDuration=0
HatchlingCaveExitGrowth=0.25
ServerLogoutTime=60
bServerAntiRevengeKill=true
RevengeKillDistance=100000
MaxCharactersPerPlayer=30
MaxCharactersPerSpecies=1
bServerAllowReplayRecording=false
bLoseQuestsOnDeath=true
SpeedhackDetection=1
SpeedhackThreshold=10
bServerCritters=true
bCritterBurrows=true
ServerMaxCritters=200
ServerCritterDensityMultiplier=0.75
;AllowedCritters={config_parameter id="allowed_critter_a"}
;DisallowedCritters={config_parameter id="disallowed_critter_a"}
bServerWaystones=true
bServerHomecaveCampingDebuff=true
bOverrideHomecaveCampingDistance=false
HomecaveCampingDistance=20000
bOverrideHomecaveCampingDelay=false
HomecaveCampingDelay=180
bTrophyQuests=true
bOverrideTrophyQuestCooldown=false
TrophyQuestCooldown=1800
MaxGroupQuests=2
bServerAllowAnselMultiplayerPausing=false
ServerAnselCameraConstraintDistance=500
bServerAllowInGameWaystone=true
bServerLocalWorldQuests=true
ServerMinTimeBetweenExplorationQuest=30
bEnforceWhitelist={config_parameter id="enforce_whitelist"}
;ServerAdmins={config_parameter id="server_admin_agid_a"}
;ServerAdmins={config_parameter id="server_admin_agid_b"}
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Global.LoginDebuffDuration",Values=(60))
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Global.LoginDebuffSpeedReduction",Values=(0.75))
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Global.LoginDebuffIncomingDamage",Values=(2))
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Global.LoginDebuffAttackDamage",Values=(0.4))
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Global.GroupLeaderBuffStaminaRecoveryMultiplier",Values=(1.1))
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Global.GroupLeaderBuffSpeedMultiplier",Values=(1.05))
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Global.InCombatDuration",Values=(30))
;CurveOverrides=(CurveName="Generic.InCombat.HealthRecovery.Multiplier",Values=(0.5))
;GroupSlotSizeOverrides=(DinoAssetID="Allosaurus",GroupSize=5)
bServerNesting=true
bNestingDecorations=true
bServerHatchlingCaveEggs=true
bServerSameSpeciesAdoptionRestriction=false
MinNestingGrowth=0.75
MaxNestImmunityBuffGrowth=0.25
MaxNestRespawnGrowth=0.5
MaxNestFreeRespawnGrowth=0.25
MinNestRespawnCondition=0.5
MinNestHealthForDecorations=0.5
MinNestBabySlotFoodWater=0.0
MinNestBabySlotResources=0.5
MinNestHealthToEditAbilities=0.75
MaxAdoptionGrowth=0.5
MaxEatFromNestGrowth=0.5
MaxDependentChildGrowth=0.5
NestInactiveDespawnTimeSolo=120
NestInactiveDespawnTimeDependents=120
NestDisrepairDespawnTime=7200
NestLowHealthThreshold=0.2
NestBabySlotGenerationTime=300
NestInvitationExpiryTime=15
NestAcceptedInvitationExpiryTime=300
FamilyBuffRange=5000
NestResourceMultiplier=1.0
NestResourcelessConstructionSpeed=5.0
bNestsInvulnerable=false
NestObstructionRadius=500
bSpawnParentNestOnLogin=false
bUseTutorialCustomGrowthMultiplier=false
TutorialCustomGrowthMultiplier=1.0
MinimumNestDistanceFromHomeRock=5000
bServerEditAbilitiesAtNest=true
MinNestBuffHealthPercent=0.5
bServerShowMapIconPopularLocation=false
ServerMapIconPopularLocationPlayerCount=10
ServerLogoutAction=0
bDisableGrouping=false

[/Script/PathOfTitans.IGameMode]
ServerStartingTime={config_parameter id="server_starting_time"}
bServerDynamicTimeOfDay={config_parameter id="dynamic_time_of_day"}
bServerRestrictCarnivoreGrouping=false
bServerRestrictHerbivoreGrouping=false
ServerDayLength={config_parameter id="server_day_length"}
ServerNightLength={config_parameter id="server_night_length"}
MaxGroupSize={config_parameter id="max_group_size"}
FurthestSpawnInclusionRadius=250000
DefaultCreatorModeSave={config_parameter id="default_creator_mode_save"}
MaxGroupLeaderCommunicationDistance=50000

[SourceQuery]
bEnabled=true
Port={gameserver.query_port}
IP="0.0.0.0"

[SourceRCON]
bEnabled=true
bLogging=true
; RCON logging is expected to write through the server log system under Saved/Logs.
; GSA exposes that folder as: \serverfiles\PathOfTitans\Saved\Logs
; No documented SourceRCON-specific filepath key was found, so custom LogFilePath keys are intentionally not enabled.
Password="{gameserver.rcon_password}"
Port={gameserver.rcon_port}
IP="0.0.0.0"
MaxFailedAttempts=5
Timeout=60
PageTimeout=5
MaxConnectionsPerIP=3
;IPAllowList={config_parameter id="rcon_ip_allowlist_a"}
;IPAllowList={config_parameter id="rcon_ip_allowlist_b"}

[BattlEye]
bEnabled=true

MOTD.txt.content:
<blue>Join us every Friday and Saturday for the Sarco dance-off competition.</>
<small>Winners get 100 marks and a Dance Master role on our Discord server!</>

Thanks and have fun!

Rules.txt.info: Rules to be displayed on Join
Rules.txt.content:
<title>{gameserver.list_name} Server Rules</>
<red>1 - Please only attack Camptos.</>
Camptosauruses are very evil!

<orange>2 - Corpse Cove is closed due to dirty water.</>

These are the only rules on this server!
<large>Thanks, and have fun!</>

Commands.ini.info: You must edit the Commands.ini to modify player roles

GameUserSettings.ini.info: This is almost exclusively used for your Mod List and some hardware-level settings.
GameUserSettings.ini.content:
[PathOfTitans.Mods]

; Add one EnabledMods line per mod when needed:
; EnabledMods="UGC_M_EXAMPLEMODID_SK"

whitelist.txt.info: Path of Titans whitelist. Add one Alderon ID per line when whitelist enforcement is enabled.

server_password.name: Server Password if desired
server_password.info: Input your password here if you want to password protect the server. Leave blank for public access.

reserved_slots.name: Admin Slots
reserved_slots.info: Number of slots reserved exclusively for admins or reserved-slot roles.

server_discord_invite_code.name: Discord Invite Code
server_discord_invite_code.info: Create a permanent Discord invite and paste only the generated code, not the full invite URL.

server_auto_restart.name: Path of Titans Auto Restart
server_auto_restart.info: Path of Titans internal auto-restart toggle. Leave disabled when GSA handles scheduled restarts and container recovery.

server_starting_time.name: World Time On Startup
server_starting_time.info: Time of day after restart, scaled 0-2400. Example: 1350.

dynamic_time_of_day.name: Enable Dynamic Time of Day
dynamic_time_of_day.info: 1 enables animated day/night cycle. 0 uses the fixed ServerStartingTime.

server_day_length.name: Day Time Duration
server_day_length.info: Length in minutes of the daylight cycle.

server_night_length.name: Night Time Duration
server_night_length.info: Length in minutes of the night cycle.

max_group_size.name: Maximum Group Size
max_group_size.info: Maximum number of group slots allowed for player groups.

auth_token.name: Alderon Auth Token
auth_token.info: Alderon Games auth token used by AlderonGamesCmd to install and update Path of Titans server files.

database.name: Database Mode
database.info: Passed to the Windows Docker container as DATABASE. Use Remote or Local.

map.name: Map
map.info: Path of Titans internal map name. Use Island for Gondwa, Panjura for Panjura, Riparia for Riparia, or the exact modded map name.

enforce_whitelist.name: Enforce Whitelist
enforce_whitelist.info: Require players to be listed in whitelist.txt before joining.

default_creator_mode_save.name: Default Creator Mode Save
default_creator_mode_save.info: Name of the creator mode save file to load at startup. Leave blank if unused.

server_guid.name: Server GUID
server_guid.info: Unique UUIDv4 for this Path of Titans server. In Docker env you can use {helper.uuid}, or set a fixed value here if you want stable identity across rebuilds.

branch.name: Branch
branch.info: Path of Titans branch key. Usually production.

launch_params.name: Extra Launch Arguments
launch_params.info: Extra startup arguments passed through Captain Gecko pot-server EXTRA_ARGS. The default wires Source Query and Source RCON to GSA-assigned ports and password.

allowed_character_a.name: Allowed Character A
allowed_character_a.info: Optional AllowedCharacters line value. Leave blank unless using character allowlists.

disallowed_character_a.name: Disallowed Character A
disallowed_character_a.info: Optional DisallowedCharacters line value. Leave blank unless using character blocklists.

allowed_critter_a.name: Allowed Critter A
allowed_critter_a.info: Optional AllowedCritters line value. Leave blank unless using critter allowlists.

disallowed_critter_a.name: Disallowed Critter A
disallowed_critter_a.info: Optional DisallowedCritters line value. Leave blank unless using critter blocklists.

server_admin_agid_a.name: Server Admin Alderon ID A
server_admin_agid_a.info: Optional ServerAdmins Alderon ID example slot.

server_admin_agid_b.name: Server Admin Alderon ID B
server_admin_agid_b.info: Optional second ServerAdmins Alderon ID example slot.
